title: potentilla × russelliana
intro: Potentilla × russelliana is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla argentea, commonly known as the Russian silver-leaved cinquefoil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × russelliana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
